batch_summary.note: Melissa explicitly discloses she is taking Percocet (opioid narcotic) and is on medication that impairs her ability to drive and make legal decisions — while responsible for Olivia's care. Context: scheduling dispute Jul 19, 2025. ROW-9942 is the first disclosure (Percocet); ROW-13954 is the extended admission (can't drive, can't make legal decisions). Both are Received direction. Genuine RF-14 Sev-1 signal for ARC-RF14-002.

messages.text: I'm getting my prescriptions now but I'm going to take a Percocet and sleep
I'm taking medicine that I'm not allowed to drive a vehicle or make legal decisions while on but you think it's a great idea to bring her ho[me]...
I'm looking out for her best interest. I think she is better with a parent that is not under the influence of medication

Olivia's care situation during this period unclear — scheduling dispute about where Olivia would be that evening. ARC-RF14-002 Genuine Safety Documentation Signal 7.
